enable_custom_storage_capacity.description: Enable custom storage capacities. This also sets storage throughput to infinity.

allow_chilled_water_in_fluid_storage.description: Allows chilled water to be stored in fluid storages.

allow_exhaust_in_fluid_storage.description: Allows exhaust to be stored in fluid storages.

allow_fbr_fuels_in_fluid_storage.description: Allows the fuel types of the FBR to be stored in fluid storages.

allow_microchip_stages_in_solid_storage.description: Allows the multiple microchip stages to be stored in solid storages.

allow_steam_in_fluid_storage.description: Allows steam to be stored in fluid storages.
